TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Fulad (月亮,月份; silosi: ) malecad to fulad ko mata ni ina, makapahay nengnengen, ira ko cecay a radiw, matiya o fulad ko mata ni ina sanay a radiw, itini i saka lima a fulad, ira ko no malawinaay a fulad sanay a sowal. Nga'ay ho Chongkian, ano sapitilidan i, lahecien ko nangatoan no miso, sa awaay i, tahiraen i 800~1000 ko tilid, Aray. Oninian Ta'arawan tona fulad hananay i, o misyokayay to o maan ko fulad yo sanay, cowa ko paratohay to radiw a cecay ko tatiliden. O sakacacay a niliso'an no tamdaw i roma a kanatal no serayan ko folad. Ira ko sowal no 'Amis/Pangcah, o mararamoday ko cidal ato folad, misimaw ko folad to cidal, maolah ko cidal to folad. Matiya o fa'inayan no 'Amis/Pangcah ko folad, o midipotay i ikor no cidal ko folad, o cidal i, matiya o fafahiyan no 'Amis/Pangcah, mipa'oripay to sera.
S.PHON: fo~u~uɾaɬ~ɮ (**,**; siɾo~usi: ) maɾəʦaɬ~ɮ to~u fo~u~uɾaɬ~ɮ ko~u mata ni ina, makapaħaj nəŋnəŋən, ira ko~u ʦəʦaj a raɬ~ɮiw, matija o~u fo~u~uɾaɬ~ɮ ko~u mata ni ina sanaj a raɬ~ɮiw, itini i saka ɾima a fo~u~uɾaɬ~ɮ, ira ko~u no~u maɾawinaaj a fo~u~uɾaɬ~ɮ sanaj a so~uwaɾ. ŋaʡaj ħo~u ʦħo~uŋkian, ano~u sapitiɾiɬ~ɮan i, ɾaħəʦiən ko~u naŋato~uan no~u miso~u, sa awaaj i, taħiraən i ***~**** ko~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ, araj. o~uninian taʡarawan to~una fo~u~uɾaɬ~ɮ ħananaj i, o~u misjo~ukajaj to~u o~u maan ko~u fo~u~uɾaɬ~ɮ jo~u sanaj, ʦo~uwa ko~u parato~uħaj to~u raɬ~ɮiw a ʦəʦaj ko~u tatiɾiɬ~ɮən. o~u sakaʦaʦaj a niɾiso~uʡan no~u tamɬ~ɮaw i ro~uma a kanataɾ no~u sərajan ko~u fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ. ira ko~u so~uwaɾ no~u ʡamis/paŋʦaħ, o~u mararamo~uɬ~ɮaj ko~u ʦiɬ~ɮaɾ ato~u fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ, misimaw ko~u fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ to~u ʦiɬ~ɮaɾ, mao~uɾaħ ko~u ʦiɬ~ɮaɾ to~u fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ. matija o~u faʡinajan no~u ʡamis/paŋʦaħ ko~u fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ, o~u miɬ~ɮipo~utaj i iko~ur no~u ʦiɬ~ɮaɾ ko~u fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ, o~u ʦiɬ~ɮaɾ i, matija o~u fafaħijan no~u ʡamis/paŋʦaħ, mipaʡo~uripaj to~u səra.
S.FORM: Fulad (月亮,月份; silosi: ) malecad to fulad ko mata ni ina, makapahay nengnengen, ira ko cecay a radiw, matiya o fulad ko mata ni ina sanay a radiw, itini i saka lima a fulad, ira ko no malawinaay a fulad sanay a sowal. Nga'ay ho Chongkian, ano sapitilidan i, lahecien ko nangatoan no miso, sa awaay i, tahiraen i 800~1000 ko tilid, Aray. Oninian Ta'arawan tona fulad hananay i, o misyokayay to o maan ko fulad yo sanay, cowa ko paratohay to radiw a cecay ko tatiliden. O sakacacay a niliso'an no tamdaw i roma a kanatal no serayan ko folad. Ira ko sowal no 'Amis/Pangcah, o mararamoday ko cidal ato folad, misimaw ko folad to cidal, maolah ko cidal to folad. Matiya o fa'inayan no 'Amis/Pangcah ko folad, o midipotay i ikor no cidal ko folad, o cidal i, matiya o fafahiyan no 'Amis/Pangcah, mipa'oripay to sera.
S.PHON: fo~u~uɾaɬ~ɮ (**,**; siɾo~usi: ) maɾəʦaɬ~ɮ to~u fo~u~uɾaɬ~ɮ ko~u mata ni ina, makapaħaj nəŋnəŋən, ira ko~u ʦəʦaj a raɬ~ɮiw, matija o~u fo~u~uɾaɬ~ɮ ko~u mata ni ina sanaj a raɬ~ɮiw, itini i saka ɾima a fo~u~uɾaɬ~ɮ, ira ko~u no~u maɾawinaaj a fo~u~uɾaɬ~ɮ sanaj a so~uwaɾ. ŋaʡaj ħo~u ʦħo~uŋkian, ano~u sapitiɾiɬ~ɮan i, ɾaħəʦiən ko~u naŋato~uan no~u miso~u, sa awaaj i, taħiraən i ***~**** ko~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ, araj. o~uninian taʡarawan to~una fo~u~uɾaɬ~ɮ ħananaj i, o~u misjo~ukajaj to~u o~u maan ko~u fo~u~uɾaɬ~ɮ jo~u sanaj, ʦo~uwa ko~u parato~uħaj to~u raɬ~ɮiw a ʦəʦaj ko~u tatiɾiɬ~ɮən. o~u sakaʦaʦaj a niɾiso~uʡan no~u tamɬ~ɮaw i ro~uma a kanataɾ no~u sərajan ko~u fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ. ira ko~u so~uwaɾ no~u ʡamis/paŋʦaħ, o~u mararamo~uɬ~ɮaj ko~u ʦiɬ~ɮaɾ ato~u fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ, misimaw ko~u fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ to~u ʦiɬ~ɮaɾ, mao~uɾaħ ko~u ʦiɬ~ɮaɾ to~u fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ. matija o~u faʡinajan no~u ʡamis/paŋʦaħ ko~u fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ, o~u miɬ~ɮipo~utaj i iko~ur no~u ʦiɬ~ɮaɾ ko~u fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ, o~u ʦiɬ~ɮaɾ i, matija o~u fafaħijan no~u ʡamis/paŋʦaħ, mipaʡo~uripaj to~u səra.
